description: You are logged into wger fitness manager at http://localhost as admin (username: admin, password: adminadmin). Your company, Apex Manufacturing, is launching a 12-week corporate wellness challenge. Using the details and requirements provided in the briefing document at /home/ga/Documents/wellness_challenge_brief.txt, register the three employee accounts as members of the Default gym (gym ID 1), create their personalized workout routines, establish the specified measurement tracking category, and create the team nutrition plan. Ensure all names, usernames, and values match the briefing document exactly.
